title: abutilon exstipulare
intro: Abutilon exstipulare, also known as the naked gourd or fruit of the holy tree, is a plant species within the Malvaceae family. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Abutilon exstipulare include treating various ailments such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Abutilon exstipulare is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and it can be combined with other herbs for enhanced therapeutic effects.
